'''Umolly Darm''' was one of the [[Newcomer]]s on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].

==Biography==
She was one of the people that found [[Tsil]]s to sell to [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]]. When she learned of their sentience, she gladly gave up searching for them and joined the [[Theran Listener]] [[Be]] in search of [[Rock ivory]] and other minerals to sell in small quantities offworld. She also gave [[Callista Ming]] a ride off of Nam Chorios.<ref name="PoT" />

{{Char-stub}}
